Description: The standardized name of this appointing department. Typically, this is a top-level department (one level below a school or college), without prefixes or abbreviations. This value is not always the official department name in the system, but rather a shorter, manually-entered name used for reporting purposes.

The University of Michigan school, college, or appointing institute to which this department belongs. Currently, only two specific institutes have the same full faculty appointing power as colleges and institutes.
The university campus for this school or college.
Auto-calculated, concatenated column to show in other lists. Do not update manually.
Department prefixes from MCommunity, separated by commas. This helps automate the mapping from MCommunity department names to TrackMaster's standardized appointing department names.
